---
name: Feature Request 💡
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for EvalForge.
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I am frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or design proposals about the feature request here.
